overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a character with a large backpack traversing a dark, rocky mountain landscape at night. The character walks along coastal ridges under an overcast sky with visible moonlight and mysterious vertical light beams in the distance, creating a somber, atmospheric mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal mountain ridge with ocean view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow mountain ridge with the ocean visible to the right side

entered.detail: dark jagged rock formations lining the left side of the path
ethereal white vertical light strands descending from the cloudy sky in the distance
dark calm sea visible beyond the right edge of the mountain ridge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rocky mountain ridge at night, flanked by dark stone slopes on both sides. Mysterious vertical light beams descend from the overcast sky in the distance, while the ocean is visible far below to the right. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook with clear sky view

events.description: character stops walking and tilts head upward to observe the sky
camera tilts upward revealing bright full moon and stars through breaking clouds

agents.ego_description: standing still and gazing up at the moon and stars in the night sky

entered.detail: bright full moon glowing through the cloudy night sky
scattered stars visible around the moon in the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The character pauses on the mountain path and looks up at the night sky. The camera tilts upward to reveal a bright full moon and scattered stars breaking through the overcast clouds, creating a moment of contemplation before the journey continues.

events.description: character resumes walking and begins ascending the steep mountain slope
vertical light beams become visible again in the distance as the character gains elevation

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the steep rocky incline toward the mountain peak ahead

entered.detail: dark rocky summit of the mountain rising ahead against the cloudy sky
ethereal white vertical light strands visible again in the distance to the left

segments.scene_description: The character continues the journey by ascending a steep rocky slope toward a distant mountain peak. The vertical light beams become visible again in the distance as elevation is gained, and the terrain becomes more rugged and challenging under the dim night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate mountain ridge that transitions from a narrow coastal path to a steep, rugged ascent. It begins with the character traversing a rocky ridge flanked by dark stone slopes, with the ocean visible far below and mysterious vertical light beams descending from an overcast sky. As the character pauses, the camera tilts upward to reveal a bright full moon and scattered stars breaking through the clouds in a moment of contemplation. The scene then shifts back to the journey as the character begins ascending a steep, rocky slope toward a distant peak. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly rugged and challenging while the distant light beams reappear as the elevation increases under the dim night sky.
